description: The canonical `not` sentinel in the same value position does NOT fire E-SYNTAX-042 (§42.7).
rationale: §42.7 normative: `not` SHALL be the only value representing absence in scrml source. This case is the exact mirror of the -pos case with the forbidden `null` token replaced by the canonical `not` sentinel; the value position is identical, so a fire here would mean the guard keys on the position rather than on the forbidden token. Pins that E-SYNTAX-042 rejects the TOKEN, not the value position.
